RAPP INDICATED TO THE COURT THAT DANIEL BORNSTEIN IS REPRESENTING HIM, HOWEVER NO SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT INSTRUCTED MR. RAPP TO INFORM MR. BORNSTEIN TO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY AND THAT HE SHOULD BE READY TO PROCEED WITH TRIAL. THE COURT WILL NOT GRANT A CONTINUANCE. THE COURT STATED THAT IF MR. BORNSTEIN IS NOT SUBSTITUTED IN, THEN MR. RAPP WILL REPRESENT HIMSELF AND THE CASE WILL PROCEED TO TRIAL. THE COURT CONTINUED THE TRIAL DATE TO FEB-27-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206.
